title: Study Flow - Get It Working
description: Fix the critical path so Trey can actually study. Cancel button + Priming methods + Tutor chat.

stories.title: Add cancel/close button to entry card overlay
stories.description: The entry card overlay has no way to dismiss it without starting a session. Add a Cancel or X close button. Add an X button in the top-right corner of the entry card (absolute positioned). Style: text-[#ffc8d3]/60 hover:text-white font-mono text-lg. When clicked, call setShowSetup(false). Also add a text Cancel button next to Start Priming / Skip Setup as an alternative dismiss. After dismissing, canvas should be usable. NEW SESSION hero button should re-open the entry card.
acceptanceCriteria: X close button visible in top-right corner of entry card
Clicking X dismisses the entry card and shows empty canvas
Cancel text button visible next to action buttons
NEW SESSION hero button re-opens the entry card after dismissal
dev-browser: click X, verify entry card gone, verify canvas interactive

stories.title: Priming method cards use colorful box UI with name and description
stories.description: The Priming panel method selector currently shows plain buttons. Replace with colorful card-style boxes. Each method card should show: (1) Colored background or left-accent bar (distinct color per method from the theme palette). (2) Method name in bold. (3) One-line description of what the method does. (4) Checkbox or selected state so user can pick one or more. Search for MethodCard, MethodTile, or similar components that may already exist from the Methods page. The method list is in the studio priming content -- trace from TutorShell primingStudioContent.
acceptanceCriteria: Each method shows as a colored card with name and description
Methods have distinct colors
User can select one or more methods
Selected methods have visual indicator
dev-browser: verify method cards have background colors and description text

stories.title: Priming method run returns actual results instead of empty
stories.description: When user selects a method and clicks Run, the Output Area shows 'This run completed, but no study artifacts were returned for the selected output format.' The backend returned a response but the frontend is not parsing it correctly OR the method runner output format does not match. Debug by: (1) Check network request when Run is clicked -- what does the API return? (2) Check what format frontend expects. (3) Fix the mismatch. Backend at 127.0.0.1:5000, endpoint likely POST /api/tutor/run or /api/tutor/method. Check brain/dashboard/api_tutor.py.
acceptanceCriteria: Running a method produces visible output in the Output Area
Method Result shows actual content not empty message
Output is formatted and readable
dev-browser: click Run, wait for response, verify output has content

stories.title: Priming Chat is functional not placeholder
stories.description: The Priming Chat shows 'Chat with priming results coming soon'. Replace with a real chat. Needs: (1) Text input and send button. (2) Send to backend priming chat endpoint. (3) Show conversation history. (4) Use priming context (method results, materials) for responses. If backend endpoint does not exist, create one in api_tutor.py that takes priming context + user message and returns LLM response.
acceptanceCriteria: Priming Chat has text input and send button
User can type and send a message
Response from backend appears in chat
Chat uses priming context for responses
dev-browser: type in priming chat, send, verify response

stories.title: Tutor chat sends messages and receives LLM responses
stories.description: The Tutor panel must send messages and receive LLM responses. Open Tutor panel, type message, send, verify response comes back. Backend tutor chat endpoint in brain/dashboard/api_tutor.py. Tutor should have access to primed context (materials, method results).
acceptanceCriteria: Tutor panel has chat input and send button
User can type and send a message
Sent message appears in chat history
LLM response appears in chat history
dev-browser: open Tutor, type message, send, verify response
